content.name: Biology Basics Practice
content.description: Fundamental cell biology and human physiology questions for general study and app testing.

questions.question: Which part of the cell contains the genetic material in most eukaryotes?
questions.explanation: The nucleus contains the chromosomes and most of the cell's genetic material.

questions.question: The human heart has how many chambers?
questions.explanation: The heart has two atria and two ventricles, making four chambers.

questions.question: Photosynthesis takes place mainly in the chloroplasts of plant cells.
questions.explanation: Chloroplasts contain chlorophyll and are the primary site of photosynthesis.

questions.question: Which blood cells help fight infection?
questions.explanation: White blood cells are part of the immune system and help defend the body.

questions.question: Mitochondria are often called the powerhouse of the cell.
questions.explanation: Mitochondria generate much of the ATP used for cellular energy.
